2606.13629.title: Valid Inference with Synthetic Data via Task Exchangeability
2606.13629.paper_summary: There is a proliferation of work arguing for the use of synthetic data in scientific research. For example, social scientists are arguing for the use of LLM-generated "silicon samples" in pilot studies; AI evaluations increasingly rely on "LLM-as-a-judge" outputs; and proteomics research is accelerated by generative models that produce synthetic protein structures. These developments raise an intriguing possibility: synthetic data may help researchers ask more questions, run more studies, and accelerate discovery. But they also raise a fundamental concern: synthetic data can be biased, noisy, and misspecified. In this work, we propose statistical principles for using synthetic data in scientific research with provable validity guarantees. The key insight is a new technical condition that we call task exchangeability. Informally, this is a requirement that the researcher can identify historical tasks, for which real data is available, such that their current task of interest is exchangeable with the historical tasks in an appropriate mathematical sense. We develop methods for valid inference under task exchangeability, together with extensions that provide guarantees even beyond exchangeability. We demonstrate the framework on public opinion surveys with silicon samples and AI evaluation with autoraters.
2606.13629.paper_summary_zh: 在科學研究中，支持使用合成數據的工作正在迅速增長。<lb/>例如，社會科學家主張在試點研究中使用LLM生成的「矽樣本」；AI評估越來越依賴於「LLM作為評判者」的輸出；而蛋白質組學研究則因生成模型產生合成蛋白質結構而加速。<lb/>這些發展提出了一個引人注目的可能性：合成數據可能幫助研究人員提出更多問題、進行更多研究並加速發現。<lb/>但它們也提出了一個根本性的擔憂：合成數據可能存在偏見、噪音和錯誤指定。在這項工作中，我們提出了使用合成數據進行科學研究的統計原則，並提供可證明的有效性保證。<lb/>關鍵見解是一種我們稱之為任務可交換性的新技術條件。<lb/>非正式地說，這是一個要求，研究人員可以識別出歷史任務，這些任務有真實數據可用，以便他們當前感興趣的任務在適當的數學意義上可以與歷史任務互換。<lb/>我們開發了在任務可交換性下進行有效推斷的方法，並擴展了即使超出可交換性也能提供保證的擴展。<lb/>我們在使用矽樣本的公共意見調查和使用自動評分者的AI評估中展示了這一框架。
2606.13629.author: Lezhi Tan et.al.
